name: hoxda_chr9
description: hoxda cluster on chr9; sister to hoxdb; retains hoxd3a, d4a, d9a, d10a, d11a, d12a, d13a. Eight zebrafish hox clusters (hoxaa/ab, hoxba/bb, hoxca/cb, hoxda/db) arose from the teleost-specific whole-genome duplication (TGD/3R) ~320-350 Mya. Each cluster spans ~100-150 kb and contains 5-13 hox paralogs of the original ~13-member tetrapod cluster. Ohnolog identity within a cluster pair is 60-85% in coding regions but conserved ~75-95% in microRNAs (mir-10, mir-196).
expected_copy_count: 1 cluster per haplotype, paired with a sister TGD-ohnolog cluster on a different chromosome
